invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破1900（近期低点）或融资费率转正超过0.005%（空头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 1900 (recent low) or funding rate turns positive above 0.005% (short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破66000（关键支撑）或融资费率转正超过0.005%（空头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 66000 (key support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.005% (short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.095（关键支撑）或融资费率转正超过0.005%（空头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.095 (key support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.005% (short pressure easing).
